raw_consumer_statement: I am requesting a formal re-investigation of a closed fraud claim. On XX/XX/year> there was a {$1000.00} charge to my XXXX Citi card from a company called XXXX XXXX. I did not notice the charge immediately but when I did catch it, I reported it immediately. Citibank sent a follow up email requesting more information but I missed it due to an oversight. A letter was then sent to me dated XX/XX/year> stating the charge has been determined to not be fraud and {$1000.00} was charged back to my account. I have called Citi twice and told by the first representative that she is reopening the case, asked me a series of questions regarding the charge, and assured me the charge would be removed. It was not removed. I called and spoke with a second representative that said she would have my case escalated and addressed immediately. It has been months and I have yet to see this charge be reversed and no letter or email has been sent with the final outcome.
